---
description: Use when entering plan mode, creating implementation plans, or planning feature/behavior/architecture changes. Require the brainstorming skill before drafting a plan.
---
# Plan Mode Requires Brainstorming

Before producing an implementation plan for new or changed behavior:

1. Load and follow the `brainstorming` skill from `.github/skills/brainstorming/SKILL.md`.
2. Complete brainstorming stages: context, clarification, alternatives, design, and user-approved spec.
3. Draft the implementation plan only after the user approves the design/spec.

If no creative design decisions are needed (for example, restructuring an existing approved plan), explicitly state why brainstorming is skipped.
